sections.paragraph: m. quadrilit. flint, hard stone, Job 28:9 Psa 114:8 more fully צוּר הַחַלָּמִישׁ Deu 8:15 32:13 . (In Arabic حَلْنَبوُسُ, not حَلْنبُوسُ pyrites. The primary idea appears to be that of smoothness, a signification found in many verbs beginning with חל, see חלב , חלה , חלק , compare glaber, gladius, Germ. glatt. A kindred word is Gr. χάλιξ, silex).
